SourceProxy.name: CurbDetector
SourceProxy.label: Curb Detector

Documentation.short_help: Detect curb edges (left/right) within a 3D ROI.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Extracts curb points in real-time from a LiDAR point cloud within a 3D region of interest. It detects the left and right curb edges inside the ROI.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ZValue
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Keep points with z exactly equal to this value.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Tolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Absolute tolerance for z equality: keep if |z - ZValue| <= Tolerance.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ZChangeMin
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Minimum Z Change (m)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum total ΔZ over X-ordered neighbors (meters).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: XRange
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: ROI X range [min max]; used for candidate filtering and ROI box.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: YRange
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: ROI Y range [min max]; used for candidate filtering and ROI box.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ZRange
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: ROI Z range [min max]; used for candidate filtering and ROI box.
